title: Elegant Kanto Courgette Onigiri
description: A savory, umami-packed onigiri featuring courgette and crisp lardons, perfect for a brunch mood.
instructions: Rinse 200g uncooked rice and cook in 250ml water until tender, about 18 minutes, then drain.
While the rice cooks, heat a skillet over medium heat and add 80g lardons, cooking until crispy, then remove and set aside.
In the same skillet, add 150g courgette and cook for 5 minutes until softened, then stir in soy sauce and mirin, cooking 2 minutes more.
Let the courgette mixture cool slightly, then mix in the drained lardons.
Cool the cooked rice until warm, then fold in the courgette-lardons mixture, seasoning with 1g salt and pepper, and add 5ml sesame oil.
Wet your hands with water, take about 60g of the mixture, shape into an oval onigiri, pressing firmly.
Cut a sheet of nori into strips, wrap each onigiri loosely, pressing the edges to seal.
Optionally sprinkle 5g toasted sesame seeds over each onigiri.
Serve immediately or refrigerate up to 4 hours for a brunch-ready snack.
Pair with a small side of miso soup and matcha tea if desired.
